UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile information, used for personalization, saving itineraries, and managing user-generated content like reviews and saved items. This entity assumes an external authentication system manages user login and password.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity. This typically corresponds to an ID from an external authentication system.

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

email.description: The primary email address of the user. (Format: email)

preferredInterests.description: A list of interests preferred by the user (e.g., 'nature', 'history', 'adventure'), used for AI-powered itinerary planning.

profileImageUrl.description: URL to the user's profile image. (Format: uri)

registeredAt.description: Timestamp when the user registered their profile. (Format: date-time)

lastLoginAt.description: Timestamp of the user's last login. (Format: date-time)

MediaAsset.title: MediaAsset
MediaAsset.description: Represents an image or video asset used throughout the application to visually enrich content in various entities.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MediaAsset entity.

url.description: The URL where the media asset is hosted. (Format: uri)

altText.description: Alternative text for the media asset, important for accessibility and SEO.

caption.description: A brief caption or description for the media asset.

uploadedAt.description: Timestamp when the media asset was uploaded. (Format: date-time)

uploaderUserId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who uploaded this media asset, if applicable. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N MediaAsset)

WonderAttraction.title: WonderAttraction
WonderAttraction.description: Represents a natural wonder, historical site, or tourist attraction in Rumonge Commune, featured in the interactive map and catalog.

id.description: Unique identifier for the WonderAttraction entity.

name.description: The name of the wonder or attraction.

description.description: A detailed description of the wonder or attraction, highlighting its features and significance.

type.description: The category or type of the attraction (e.g., 'Natural Wonder', 'Historical Site', 'Point of Interest', 'Beach').

latitude.description: The geographical latitude of the attraction for map display.

longitude.description: The geographical longitude of the attraction for map display.

address.description: The physical address of the attraction.

openingHours.description: Textual description of the opening and closing hours or visitor access times.

contactEmail.description: Contact email for inquiries about the attraction. (Format: email)

contactPhone.description: Contact phone number for the attraction.

websiteUrl.description: Official website URL for the attraction. (Format: uri)

imageIds.description: References to MediaAsset entities representing images of the attraction. (Relationship: WonderAttraction N:N MediaAsset)

videoIds.description: References to MediaAsset entities representing videos of the attraction. (Relationship: WonderAttraction N:N MediaAsset)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the attraction record was created. (Format: date-time)

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the attraction record was last updated. (Format: date-time)

CulturalHeritage.title: CulturalHeritage
CulturalHeritage.description: Showcases specific traditions, historical narratives, local arts, or crafts that define Rumonge Commune's cultural identity.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CulturalHeritage entity.

name.description: The name of the cultural heritage item (e.g., 'Traditional Dance of Rumonge', 'Local Pottery Craft').

description.description: A concise description of the cultural heritage, its significance, and what it represents.

type.description: The category of cultural heritage (e.g., 'Art Form', 'Tradition', 'Historical Narrative', 'Local Craft', 'Cuisine').

history.description: Detailed historical background and evolution of the cultural heritage.

practices.description: Description of the practices, techniques, or customs associated with the cultural heritage.

imageIds.description: References to MediaAsset entities representing images of the cultural heritage. (Relationship: CulturalHeritage N:N MediaAsset)

videoIds.description: References to MediaAsset entities representing videos of the cultural heritage. (Relationship: CulturalHeritage N:N MediaAsset)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the cultural heritage record was created. (Format: date-time)

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the cultural heritage record was last updated. (Format: date-time)

Event.title: Event
Event.description: Details about upcoming local events and festivals happening in Rumonge Commune, displayed in a dynamic calendar.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Event entity.

name.description: The name of the event or festival.

description.description: A detailed description of the event, including activities, schedule, and significance.

startDate.description: The starting date and time of the event. (Format: date-time)

endDate.description: The ending date and time of the event. (Format: date-time)

locationName.description: The name of the location where the event is held.

latitude.description: The geographical latitude of the event location for map display.

longitude.description: The geographical longitude of the event location for map display.

address.description: The physical address of the event location.

organizerContact.description: Contact information for the event organizer (e.g., phone, email, or contact person).

websiteUrl.description: Official website URL for the event, if available. (Format: uri)

imageIds.description: References to MediaAsset entities representing images of the event. (Relationship: Event N:N MediaAsset)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the event record was created. (Format: date-time)

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the event record was last updated. (Format: date-time)

Itinerary.title: Itinerary
Itinerary.description: A personalized travel plan generated by the AI tool or explicitly created/saved by a user, including a sequence of attractions, cultural spots, and events.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Itinerary entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who owns or saved this itinerary. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Itinerary)

name.description: A user-friendly name for the itinerary (e.g., 'My 3-day Nature & History Tour').

description.description: A brief description of the itinerary's focus or content.

isGeneratedByAI.description: Indicates if the itinerary was originally generated by the AI planner or created manually.

preferencesUsed.description: A list of preferences (e.g., 'nature', 'history', 'adventure', 'relaxation') that were considered or used to create this itinerary.

lengthOfStayDays.description: The planned duration of the itinerary in days.

items.description: An ordered list of activities or points of interest included in the itinerary.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the itinerary was created. (Format: date-time)

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the itinerary was last updated. (Format: date-time)

Accommodation.title: Accommodation
Accommodation.description: Provides comprehensive information about accommodation options for visitors in Rumonge Commune.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Accommodation entity.

name.description: The name of the accommodation (e.g., hotel, guesthouse, lodge).

description.description: A detailed description of the accommodation, including facilities, services, and amenities.

address.description: The physical address of the accommodation.

latitude.description: The geographical latitude of the accommodation for map display.

longitude.description: The geographical longitude of the accommodation for map display.

contactEmail.description: Contact email for the accommodation. (Format: email)

contactPhone.description: Contact phone number for the accommodation.

websiteUrl.description: Official website URL for the accommodation. (Format: uri)

imageIds.description: References to MediaAsset entities representing images of the accommodation. (Relationship: Accommodation N:N MediaAsset)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the accommodation record was created. (Format: date-time)

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the accommodation record was last updated. (Format: date-time)

TransportationOption.title: TransportationOption
TransportationOption.description: Details about various transportation methods available for tourists to get around Rumonge Commune.

id.description: Unique identifier for the TransportationOption entity.

name.description: The name of the transportation option (e.g., 'Rumonge Taxi Service', 'Local Bus Route 1', 'Boat Rental').

description.description: A description of the service, including routes, coverage areas, or specifics about vehicle types.

type.description: The type of transportation (e.g., 'Taxi Service', 'Bus Route', 'Boat Rental', 'Car Rental', 'Motorbike Rental').

operatingHours.description: Textual description of the operating hours for the transportation service.

fareInformation.description: Information regarding fares, pricing structure, or payment methods.

contactEmail.description: Contact email for the transportation service. (Format: email)

contactPhone.description: Contact phone number for the transportation service.

websiteUrl.description: Official website URL for the transportation service, if available. (Format: uri)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the transportation option record was created. (Format: date-time)

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the transportation option record was last updated. (Format: date-time)

LocalCuisineSpot.title: LocalCuisineSpot
LocalCuisineSpot.description: Information about local eateries, restaurants, or spots offering traditional Rumonge cuisine and dining experiences.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LocalCuisineSpot entity.

name.description: The name of the cuisine spot (e.g., 'Mama's Kitchen', 'Lake View Restaurant') or a specific local dish.

description.description: A description of the cuisine spot, its ambiance, typical offerings, or the specific local dishes it highlights.

type.description: The type of cuisine spot (e.g., 'Restaurant', 'Cafe', 'Food Stall', 'Market', 'Bar & Grill').

address.description: The physical address of the cuisine spot.

latitude.description: The geographical latitude of the cuisine spot for map display.

longitude.description: The geographical longitude of the cuisine spot for map display.

specialties.description: A list of specialty dishes, drinks, or items offered by the cuisine spot (e.g., 'Isombe', 'Mandrazi', 'Fish from Lake Tanganyika').

contactEmail.description: Contact email for the cuisine spot. (Format: email)

contactPhone.description: Contact phone number for the cuisine spot.

websiteUrl.description: Official website URL for the cuisine spot, if available. (Format: uri)

imageIds.description: References to MediaAsset entities representing images of the cuisine spot or its signature dishes. (Relationship: LocalCuisineSpot N:N MediaAsset)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the cuisine spot record was created. (Format: date-time)

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the cuisine spot record was last updated. (Format: date-time)

TravelTip.title: TravelTip
TravelTip.description: Helpful tips and essential information for visitors traveling to Rumonge Commune, categorized for easy access.

id.description: Unique identifier for the TravelTip entity.

title.description: The title or concise summary of the travel tip.

content.description: The detailed content or advice of the travel tip.

category.description: The category of the tip (e.g., 'Health & Safety', 'Local Customs', 'Money & Banking', 'Visa Information', 'Transportation').

authorUserId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who authored this travel tip. This could be an admin user or a contributor. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N TravelTip)

lastUpdatedAt.description: Timestamp when the travel tip was last updated. (Format: date-time)

Review.title: Review
Review.description: User-generated reviews and ratings for various entities within the application, providing social proof and feedback.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Review entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who wrote this review. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Review)

targetEntityType.description: The type of entity being reviewed (e.g., 'WonderAttraction', 'CulturalHeritage', 'Event', 'Accommodation', 'LocalCuisineSpot').

targetEntityId.description: Reference to the specific entity (WonderAttraction, CulturalHeritage, Event, etc.) that is being reviewed. (Relationship: Review 1:N [Various Entities])

rating.description: The numerical rating given by the user, typically on a scale (e.g., 1 to 5 stars).

comment.description: The textual comment or detailed feedback provided by the user.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the review was created. (Format: date-time)

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the review was last updated. (Format: date-time)

SavedItem.title: SavedItem
SavedItem.description: Allows users to bookmark or save various entities (e.g., attractions, itineraries, events) for quick access later, forming a personalized wishlist.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SavedItem entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who saved this item. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N SavedItem)

savedEntityType.description: The type of entity that has been saved (e.g., 'WonderAttraction', 'CulturalHeritage', 'Event', 'Itinerary', 'Accommodation', 'LocalCuisineSpot').

savedEntityId.description: Reference to the specific entity (WonderAttraction, CulturalHeritage, Event, etc.) that is saved. (Relationship: SavedItem 1:N [Various Entities])

savedAt.description: Timestamp when the item was saved by the user. (Format: date-time)

definition.description: Stores user profile information, where the document ID is the user's Firebase Authentication UID. This is private data accessible only by the owning user. The 'id' field within the document must match the 'userId' path parameter and 'request.auth.uid'.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user, matching 'request.auth.uid'.

definition.description: A collection used for Database Access Control (DBAC). The existence of a document at '/roles_admin/{uid}' indicates that the user with that UID has administrative privileges. Accessible only for read by rules, writeable by other admins or server functions. This structure enables Authorization Independence for global roles.

params.name: adminId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who is an administrator, matching 'request.auth.uid'.

definition.description: Stores public image and video assets used throughout the application. All documents in this collection are publicly readable. Write access is restricted to administrators or authorized services, ensuring structural segregation for public content.

params.name: mediaAssetId
params.description: The unique ID of the media asset.

definition.description: Stores information about natural wonders and attractions. All documents in this collection are publicly readable. Write access is restricted to administrators, ensuring structural segregation for public content.

params.name: wonderAttractionId
params.description: The unique ID of the wonder attraction.

definition.description: Stores information about cultural heritage items. All documents in this collection are publicly readable. Write access is restricted to administrators, ensuring structural segregation for public content.

params.name: culturalHeritageId
params.description: The unique ID of the cultural heritage item.

definition.description: Stores details about local events and festivals. All documents in this collection are publicly readable. Write access is restricted to administrators, ensuring structural segregation for public content.

params.name: eventId
params.description: The unique ID of the event.

definition.description: Stores personalized travel itineraries, owned by a specific user. The 'userId' in the path ensures authorization independence; only the owner can read/write. Includes denormalized 'userId' field for data integrity.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who owns this itinerary.

params.name: itineraryId
params.description: The unique ID of the itinerary.

definition.description: Stores information about accommodation options. All documents in this collection are publicly readable. Write access is restricted to administrators, ensuring structural segregation for public content.

params.name: accommodationId
params.description: The unique ID of the accommodation.

definition.description: Stores details about transportation methods. All documents in this collection are publicly readable. Write access is restricted to administrators, ensuring structural segregation for public content.

params.name: transportationOptionId
params.description: The unique ID of the transportation option.

definition.description: Stores information about local eateries and cuisine spots. All documents in this collection are publicly readable. Write access is restricted to administrators, ensuring structural segregation for public content.

params.name: localCuisineSpotId
params.description: The unique ID of the local cuisine spot.

definition.description: Stores helpful travel tips for visitors. All documents in this collection are publicly readable. Write access is restricted to administrators or authorized contributors, ensuring structural segregation for public content.

params.name: travelTipId
params.description: The unique ID of the travel tip.

definition.description: Stores user-generated reviews. All documents in this collection are publicly readable for QAPs, but write (create, update, delete) access is restricted to the 'userId' who authored the review. Includes denormalized 'userId' field for authorization independence.

params.name: reviewId
params.description: The unique ID of the review.

definition.description: Allows users to bookmark various entities, forming a personalized wishlist. The 'userId' in the path ensures authorization independence; only the owner can read/write. Includes denormalized 'userId' field for data integrity.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user who saved this item.

params.name: savedItemId
params.description: The unique ID of the saved item.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore data structure for 'Rumonge Cultural Trails' is designed with a strong emphasis on Authorization Independence, Structural Segregation, and Read Predictability (QAPs) to ensure a secure, scalable, and easily debuggable backend. 

**Authorization Independence & Denormalization:**
*   **User-Owned Data:** For entities like `Itinerary` and `SavedItem`, a hierarchical path `/users/{userId}/<collectionName>/{entityId}` is employed. This structure inherently ensures authorization independence because the `userId` is part of the document's path. Rules can directly compare `request.auth.uid` with the `{userId}` wildcard in the path, eliminating the need for `get()` calls to a parent document or complex document lookups. The `userId` field within these documents serves as a crucial invariant, providing an additional layer of data integrity. Atomic creation of user and owned sub-documents is simplified.
*   **Reviews (Public Read, Private Write):** For `Review` entities, which are public to view but privately owned for writing, they are stored in a top-level collection `/reviews/{reviewId}`. Authorization for write operations is achieved by denormalizing the `userId` directly into the `Review` document itself. Firebase Security Rules will check `request.auth.uid == resource.data.userId` for write access, again avoiding `get()` operations and supporting atomic writes.
*   **Global Roles (DBAC):** For administrative access, a dedicated top-level collection `/roles_admin/{adminId}` is used. The mere existence of a document at `request.auth.uid` within this collection grants administrative privileges. This avoids custom claims and ensures atomic, explicit role checks.

**Structural Segregation & QAPs (Rules are not Filters):**
*   **Public Content Collections:** Core application content such as `WonderAttraction`, `CulturalHeritage`, `Event`, `Accommodation`, `TransportationOption`, `LocalCuisineSpot`, `TravelTip`, and `MediaAsset` are stored in separate, top-level collections (e.g., `/wonderAttractions/{wonderAttractionId}`). These collections are designed for public read access by all users and administrative write access. This structural segregation ensures that `list` operations on these collections will always return legitimately accessible (public) data, satisfying the QAPs principle. Rules for these collections will simply grant `read` to `if true` and `write` to `if exists(/databases/$(database)/documents/roles_admin/$(request.auth.uid))`. 
*   **User-Specific Private Collections:** `UserProfile`, `Itinerary`, and `SavedItem` are strictly separated under the `/users/{userId}` hierarchy. This ensures that `list` operations within these paths will only ever return data belonging to the authenticated user, as guaranteed by the path-based authorization (`request.auth.uid == userId`). There's no possibility of a user querying `/users` and needing client-side filtering; they can only query their own path.

This design prioritizes explicit authorization rules directly tied to the document path or its intrinsic fields, eliminating complex rule dependencies and making the system highly debuggable and secure.
